Research in the metaverseMeta · 2025–26

7+ years researching how people play and understanding AI–Human Interaction. Untangling ambiguous 0→1 products, turning AI and the Metaverse into strategy at Meta's Reality Labs, and taking LEGO's first new brick in 90 years from concept to production.

My career

2025 – 26 Meta — Reality Labs · UX Researcher
First strategic papers on AI co-creation · unlockables research → +10% MAU on Horizon Mobile
2022 – 25 The LEGO Group — Creative Play Lab · Experimental Researcher
SMART Play™ System from concept to production · Pokémon, LEGO's largest 2026 release
2022 On Device Research · Senior Research Executive (freelance)
40+ studies across digital brand campaigns
2020 – 22 Streetbees · Senior Research Executive
GSK across all emerging markets · Kellogg's · landmark Gen Z studies
2019 – 20 Adylic (Omnicom) · Digital Strategist
Junior → Lead in 9 months · EasyJet +38% conversion uplift

LEGO || SMART PLAY™

The first new brick in 90 years

Problem

Could a LEGO brick become digital without killing what makes it play?

What we did

Research from first concept to production — IDIs, concept testing, a 15+ person pod, and a first-of-its-kind motion-capture facility.

Results

The brand's first major brick innovation in 90 years shipped as the SMART Play™ System.

META || AI CO-CREATION

How people actually create with AI

Problem

Meta needed to know how people want to create with AI — and where human control matters.

What we did

Foundational mixed-method research; published Meta's first strategic papers on AI co-creation for text and game generation.

Results

Cleared the concept gate into production and became the blueprint design and engineering built against.

META || STICKER EVOLUTION

Bridging millions into Horizon

Problem

How do you move Facebook and Instagram users into Horizon — and make them stay?

What we did

Lead pathfinder on unlockables (80% of all bridged users); rapid IDIs on rewards pointed the team to Non-Avatar Stickers.

Results

+10% monthly active users on Horizon Mobile; mobile MAU doubled over a critical 3-month window.
